---
title: "Verses on the Gospels for Sundays and Holydays By Charlotte M. Yonge."
---

## Verses on the Gospels for Sundays and Holydays By Charlotte M. Yonge.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1880
**Genre:** Non-fiction: theology (verse)
**Format:** 16pp

**Publisher:** London: Walter Smith

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
